title: corybas speculum
intro: Corybas speculum, also known as the "spotted helmet orchid," is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Corybas speculum is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, although its use is mostly limited to traditional and folk medicine.
